name: Customer Stack Blueprint — Workato Native Blueprint
summary: Turns a customer workflow request and tool-stack intake into a reusable implementation blueprint that recommends the closest validated asset, the right orchestration recipe, and the connector substitutions required for CRM, delivery, and meeting-source differences. Native-first Workato blueprint that favors recipe functions, custom connectors, and native delivery/connectivity surfaces over raw HTTP steps.

native_connectors_required: Salesforce, HubSpot, or Dynamics connector for CRM reads and writes
Slack connector or Workbot for Slack for channel and DM delivery
Microsoft Teams connector or Workbot for Microsoft Teams
Gmail, Microsoft Outlook, or approved email connector for message delivery
Linear connector or approved custom connector for issue routing
Meeting-system connector or approved custom connector for transcript intake
Lookup tables, data tables, or project properties for routing and canonical maps
Webhook connector, database connector, queue adapter, or downstream orchestrator action
prohibited_patterns: No repeated Universal HTTP or ad hoc API request actions for Slack, CRM, calendar, or email delivery
No credentials stored in formula literals, project properties comments, or recipe notes
No agent output sent straight to transport or records without JSON schema validation
No routing, dedupe, or retry logic hidden inside opaque code snippets when Recipe Functions or data tables can own it

trigger_model.recommended_surface: Native CRM event trigger or API Platform endpoint

targets: Webhook, queue, database, or downstream workflow sink
connectors: Slack connector or Workbot for Slack for channel and DM delivery
Microsoft Teams connector or Workbot for Microsoft Teams
Gmail, Microsoft Outlook, or approved email connector for message delivery
Linear connector or approved custom connector for issue routing
Webhook connector, database connector, queue adapter, or downstream orchestrator action

recipe_functions.purpose: Normalize the Customer Stack Blueprint trigger into the shared run_context contract.
Load and normalize the primary Customer Stack Blueprint business inputs into source_record objects.
Join the intermediate context needed for Customer Stack Blueprint, especially Normalize Customer Context, Match Validated Patterns.
Render normalized delivery_payload objects for Customer Stack Blueprint.
Capture deterministic summary, dedupe, and retry state for Customer Stack Blueprint.

main_recipes.trigger: Native CRM event trigger or API Platform endpoint
steps: Use CRM connector action for Normalize Customer Context
Use CRM connector action for Match Validated Patterns
Use an LLM connector or AI step to return strict JSON for AI Blueprint Design
Use database, queue, webhook, or downstream app connector for Deliver Blueprint
Record deterministic run summary and retry state

ai_blueprint_design.intent: AI Agent recommends the best starting asset, orchestration approach, connector substitutions, rollout milestones, and productization notes.

deployment_notes: Store connector configuration, defaults, and destination IDs in connection objects or project properties.
Use lookup tables or data tables for routing maps, dedupe keys, and canonical mappings.
Split fan-out delivery into deterministic recipe-function stages so Slack, Teams, and email stay independently testable.
Keep synthesis agentic, but keep delivery and persistence deterministic.
